title: CSS Units
description: Fix the broken layout by replacing incorrect CSS units with the correct ones: px, em, rem, and percentages
html:
Units Matter

This text should be properly sized.

I take up half the container width.

validationRules.message: The text should be 1rem (16px at default)
The box should be approximately 50% of the container width

hints.text: Check each unit carefully. 'em' and 'px' mean very different things. Percentages are relative to the parent.
The heading needs 'px' not 'em'. The text needs 'rem' not 'px' (1rem = 16px default). The box needs '%' not 'px'.
